title: Streptocarpus goetzeanus
taxonomy: Streptocarpus goetzeanus is classified in the family Gesneriaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. This family is part of the order Lamiales, which includes a diverse group of plants such as mint, sesame, and snapdragons. Within the family Gesneriaceae, Streptocarpus goetzeanus belongs to the genus Streptocarpus, which includes approximately 80 species of flowering plants.
